requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Back-Office Communications for Tajikistan EV Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 塔吉克斯坦电动汽车充电的OCPP互操作与后台通信
requirement_topic.zht: 塔吉克斯坦電動汽車充電的OCPP互操作與後台通訊

summary.en: Tajikistan does not have a nationally mandated back-office communication protocol for EV chargers as of 2026-06-14, reflecting the nascent state of the EV charging market. However, projects procured by internationally funded programmes (World Bank, ADB, EBRD, or bilateral donors supporting Tajikistan energy or transport infrastructure) and technically sophisticated operators commonly specify OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) as the charger-to-backend communication standard, consistent with the IEC 62196 connector direction. OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 is the expected version range for new installations. For DC charging stations where CCS2 is specified, the DC-side vehicle communication protocol is IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 — not GB/T 27930, which is the China-domestic CAN bus protocol used with GB/T 20234.3 connectors. There is no Tajikistan equivalent of Qatar's Tarsheed centralised management platform; each operator or project may run its own back-office or use a commercial charge-point management system (CPMS). EMC requirements follow IEC 61000 series standards as adopted or referenced by Tajikstandart.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，塔吉克斯坦尚未为电动汽车充电桩制定全国性后台通信协议强制规定，反映了电动汽车充电市场的初期阶段。然而，由国际资助计划（世界银行、亚行、欧洲复兴开发银行或支持塔吉克斯坦能源或交通基础设施的双边捐助方）采购的项目，以及技术要求较高的运营商，通常将OCPP（开放充电点协议）规定为充电桩与后台的通信标准，与IEC 62196接口方向一致。新安装的预期版本范围为OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1。对于规定使用CCS2的直流充电站，车辆侧直流通信协议为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118——而非中国国内配合GB/T 20234.3接口使用的GB/T 27930 CAN总线协议。塔吉克斯坦没有类似卡塔尔Tarsheed的集中管理平台；每个运营商或项目可能运行自己的后台，或使用商业充电点管理系统（CPMS）。EMC要求遵循Tajikstandart采纳或引用的IEC 61000系列标准。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，塔吉克斯坦尚未為電動汽車充電樁制定全國性後台通訊協議強制規定，反映了電動汽車充電市場的初期階段。然而，由國際資助計劃（世界銀行、亞行、歐洲復興開發銀行或支持塔吉克斯坦能源或交通基礎設施的雙邊捐助方）採購的項目，以及技術要求較高的運營商，通常將OCPP（開放充電點協議）規定為充電樁與後台的通訊標準，與IEC 62196接口方向一致。新安裝的預期版本範圍為OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1。對於規定使用CCS2的直流充電站，車輛側直流通訊協議為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118——而非中國國內配合GB/T 20234.3接口使用的GB/T 27930 CAN總線協議。塔吉克斯坦沒有類似卡塔爾Tarsheed的集中管理平台；每個運營商或項目可能運行自己的後台，或使用商業充電點管理系統（CPMS）。EMC要求遵循Tajikstandart採納或引用的IEC 61000系列標準。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 (Open Charge Point Protocol) — charger-to-backend communication for networked chargers
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
ISO 15118 — Road vehicles — Vehicle to grid communication interface
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility (as adopted or referenced by Tajikstandart)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use GB/T 27930-2023 for communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system — a CAN bus protocol that is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 vehicle communication stack. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 systems. Chinese charger firmware capable of OCPP and IEC 61851-24 exists in export-configured products but must be explicitly confirmed and verified for the Tajikistan project.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118车辆通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系统所要求的PP/CP信号。支持OCPP和IEC 61851-24的中国充电桩固件存在于出口配置产品中，但须针对塔吉克斯坦项目明确确认和验证。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118車輛通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2系統所要求的PP/CP信號。支持OCPP和IEC 61851-24的中國充電樁固件存在於出口配置產品中，但須針對塔吉克斯坦項目明確確認和驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters targeting IEC-direction Tajikistan projects must confirm: (1) charger firmware supports OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 with the specific back-office or CPMS required by the project or operator; (2) for CCS2 DC stations, GB/T 27930 communication is replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118; (3) EMC test evidence per IEC 61000 series is available and aligned with Tajikstandart expectations; (4) back-office connectivity functions correctly over the cellular or landline internet connectivity available in Tajikistan — network reliability, especially in mountain regions, is limited and the charger should handle offline queuing and reconnection gracefully; (5) there is no Tajikistan centralised management platform — each operator runs its own back-office, so OCPP interoperability across CPMS systems is a practical requirement, not mandated by a single authority. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP firmware cannot serve IEC-direction Tajikistan projects.
gap.zh: 面向IEC方向的塔吉克斯坦项目出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持OCPP 1.6或2.0.1，并与项目或运营商要求的具体后台或CPMS兼容；(2) 对于CCS2直流充电站，将GB/T 27930通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 具备符合Tajikstandart预期的IEC 61000系列EMC测试证据；(4) 后台连接能在塔吉克斯坦可用的蜂窝或有线互联网连接下正常运行——网络可靠性尤其在山区有限，充电桩应能妥善处理离线排队和重连；(5) 塔吉克斯坦没有集中管理平台——每个运营商运行自己的后台，因此OCPP跨CPMS系统的互操作是实际要求，而非单一主管机构的规定。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP固件的充电桩无法服务于IEC方向的塔吉克斯坦项目。
gap.zht: 面向IEC方向的塔吉克斯坦項目出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持OCPP 1.6或2.0.1，並與項目或運營商要求的具體後台或CPMS兼容；(2) 對於CCS2直流充電站，將GB/T 27930通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 具備符合Tajikstandart預期的IEC 61000系列EMC測試證據；(4) 後台連接能在塔吉克斯坦可用的蜂窩或有線互聯網連接下正常運行——網絡可靠性尤其在山區有限，充電樁應能妥善處理離線排隊和重連；(5) 塔吉克斯坦沒有集中管理平台——每個運營商運行自己的後台，因此OCPP跨CPMS系統的互操作是實際要求，而非單一主管機構的規定。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP固件的充電樁無法服務於IEC方向的塔吉克斯坦項目。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no national Tajikistan mandate for OCPP as of 2026-06-14; OCPP is the de facto standard for internationally funded and IEC-direction projects; IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 replaces GB/T 27930 for CCS2 DC stations; EMC per IEC 61000 expected by Tajikstandart-aligned projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2 deployments in Tajikistan IEC-direction projects

source.publisher: Open Charge Alliance — OCPP protocol governance body

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tajikistan has no national OCPP mandate yet, but internationally funded and IEC-direction projects de facto require OCPP. Ensure the charger firmware is export-configured for OCPP and IEC 61851-24 (not GB/T 27930), and plan for the limited and intermittent network connectivity found in mountain areas.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塔吉克斯坦目前尚无全国性OCPP强制规定，但国际资助和IEC方向的项目事实上要求OCPP。须确保充电桩固件已配置为OCPP和IEC 61851-24出口版本（而非GB/T 27930），并针对山区网络连接有限且不稳定的情况做好规划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塔吉克斯坦目前尚無全國性OCPP強制規定，但國際資助和IEC方向的項目事實上要求OCPP。須確保充電樁固件已配置為OCPP和IEC 61851-24出口版本（而非GB/T 27930），並針對山區網絡連接有限且不穩定的情況做好規劃。
